service_id.description: Plural service ID whose GitOps manifest tarball should be searched. This is a UUID, not a human-readable service name. Provide this or stack_id (at least one is required). When both are present, the implementation resolves the service first.

stack_id.description: Plural stack ID whose GitOps manifest files should be searched. This is a UUID, not a stack name. Provide this or service_id (at least one is required).

glob.description: Optional path glob (PathGlob syntax) matched against manifest paths. Returns a JSON array of matching relative paths only. It's ok to use broad globs if unsure since the returned dataset size will likely not be large.

grep.description: Optional regular expression (Elixir/PCRE-style) searched across each file's contents. Returns matches grouped by file; only files with at least one match are included. Each hit includes a snippet with surrounding line context plus start_line and end_line. Invalid regex patterns produce a tool error.

read.description: Optional exact manifest path (as returned in the file list) whose full contents should be returned as a path/content object. The path must match exactly; otherwise the tool returns file not found.
